4885.one_line_summary: Subscription tokens giving holders time-limited access to NFTs/semi-fungibles.
4885.notes: Bridges subscription mechanics with NFT ownership; subscription balance decreases linearly over time.

4886.one_line_summary: Register for proxy ownership linking cold wallets to active proxy addresses.
4886.notes: Enables proving asset ownership via proxy without direct interaction from cold wallet.

4906.one_line_summary: Standard MetadataUpdate and BatchMetadataUpdate events for 721/1155 tokens.
4906.notes: Lightweight extension enabling third-party platforms to timely update NFT metadata.

4907.one_line_summary: Dual owner/user roles for 721 NFTs with time-limited rental periods.
4907.notes: Enables NFT rentals with automatic expiry; user cannot transfer.

4910.one_line_summary: Hierarchical royalty distribution system for 721 NFTs via Royalty Accounts.
4910.notes: Supports multi-level royalty trees; handles complex inheritance and payout logic.

4931.one_line_summary: Standard interface for upgrading ERC-20 tokens with configurable ratios.
4931.notes: Supports both upgrade and optional downgrade; reusable across different token pairs.

4944.one_line_summary: Single NFT per contract, uniquely identifying token by contract address.
4944.notes: Restricts 721 to exactly one token; enables contract as autonomous agent with budget.

4950.one_line_summary: Two entangled NFTs per contract for authenticity, royalties, and shared wallet.
4950.notes: Enables artist to prove creation; only one transfer possible per pair.

4955.one_line_summary: Vendor-specific metadata namespaces extension for 721/1155 NFTs.
4955.notes: Allows project-specific data (e.g. 3D models) in standard JSON metadata without breaking compatibility.

4972.one_line_summary: Smart contract account linked to ENS name node, owned by name owner.
4972.notes: Enables one-to-one mapping from human-readable name to programmable account.

4973.one_line_summary: Non-transferrable account-bound tokens (soulbound) with EIP-712 signature verification.
4973.notes: Tokens bind to single account; no transfer interface; can unequip voluntarily.

4974.one_line_summary: Standardized interface for assigning and managing int8 numerical ratings.
4974.notes: Operator-controlled ratings; supports voting weight, experience points, loyalty tracking.

4987.one_line_summary: Interface to query ownership and balance of tokens held by contracts.
4987.notes: Separates functional owner from technical owner; enables governance/membership verification despite token deposits.

5005.one_line_summary: Composable interfaces for modular accounts: Avatars, Modules, Modifiers, Guards.
5005.notes: Decouples authentication from execution; enables flexible multi-control and progressive decentralization.

5006.one_line_summary: User role extension for ERC-1155 enabling time-bound rental/usage rights.
5006.notes: Parallel to 4907 for semi-fungibles; user cannot transfer.
